message: Performance goal created with evaluator contract

evidence: Implemented Phase 7 skeletonization and context shaping: added skeletonizer, expansion policy, and snippet renderer; ContextBuilder now renders snippets through expansion policy; large chunks default to skeleton, precise/debug matches return focused body windows, full requests can return full_body, and returned/original/elided line counts are computed from rendered output. Regression tests cover large skeleton output, focused marker windows, small chunk behavior, and existing context behavior. Evaluator passed: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build.

Evaluator passed: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build. Completion audit: ContextBuilder uses snippet renderer; expansion policy emits skeleton/focused_body/full_body; skeletonizer preserves signatures and folds implementations; large chunks default to skeleton; precise debug matches return focused windows; original/returned/elided line counts reflect rendered content. Tests cover all declared criteria.
